about.title: About me
about.description: Full Stack Web Developer with more than 4 years of experience. I have contributed to software development and implemented new features across various projects, optimizing performance and enhancing user experience. I am passionate about creating efficient and innovative solutions.

soft_skills: Team collaboration across distributed teams and projects
Autonomous project ownership from concept to production
Rapid learning of new frameworks and AI technologies
Cross-functional problem solving and system design
Attention to detail in code quality, security, and API precision

achievements: Built a production RAG chatbot system with LangChain, OpenAI API, and MongoDB Atlas for chequeabolivia.bo, enabling intelligent document queries with persistent semantic memory.
Deployed a multi-platform chatbot service (FastAPI) across Telegram, WhatsApp, and web with persistent conversation context and semantic memory management.
Engineered prompt optimization and caching strategies that reduced LLM inference costs while maintaining response quality for complex RAG workflows.
Developed an AI content moderation service using image recognition models, deployed via FastAPI for real-time inappropriate content detection.
Designed an OCR RESTful API with Google Cloud Vision for extracting text from official documents (DNI, passports, certificates) with high field accuracy.
Implemented spatial text analysis pipeline detecting document type and country of origin, enabling automated routing to specialized parsing templates.
Built a template automation system for structural document recognition, significantly reducing onboarding time for new document formats.
Integrated external platforms with Hospy's OCR infrastructure, supporting customer acquisition and platform expansion.

company_info.description: AI-powered platform for short-term rentals and boutique hotels in Latin America. Named in Hot 25 Travel Startups for 2026 (PhocusWire). Partner of Cloudbeds PMS marketplace.
company_info.product: Empleados de IA — contactless check-in, guest verification, operations automation

achievements: Reduced platform loading times by 70% through aggressive performance optimization (caching layers, lazy-loading, query optimization).
Built an automated Typeform data pipeline generating real-time dashboards and PDF reports for internal team use.
Automated HR data pipelines for performance metrics and evaluations, significantly accelerating report generation processes.
Implemented unit test suites that improved code reliability and reduced production bugs across the platform.

company_info.description: Tech consulting firm with offices in Bogotá & Montréal. +9 years in tech, +100 clients, +10 countries. Specializes in custom software, cloud infrastructure, and AI solutions.
company_info.services: Custom Software Development, Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps, Big Data Analytics & AI

projects.title: ChekiBot
projects.description: Production RAG chatbot system for chequeabolivia.bo that processes financial document queries using multimodal LLMs (Nebius, OpenAI). Delivers intelligent responses via Telegram, WhatsApp, and web interfaces with persistent semantic memory.

projects.title: Botcachino
projects.description: Agentic chatbot for Universidad Mayor de San Simón that handles academic schedule queries, exam dates, and course management using natural language. Built with LangGraph for multi-step reasoning and PostgreSQL for state persistence across multi-turn conversations.

projects.title: FaceMasker
projects.description: Real-time face mask detection system using deep learning. Uses PyTorch with a pre-trained CNN model to classify whether individuals are wearing masks in images. Includes trained models, test suite, and Docker deployment.

projects.title: Green Recovery (Pix2Pix)
projects.description: Image-to-image translation model using Pix2Pix GANs for environmental recovery visualization. Trains a conditional GAN to transform satellite imagery, with custom dataset pipeline, training loop, and loss optimization. Demonstrates deep understanding of generative AI architectures.
